title: eBay sales growth expected for 3Q
text: Higher revenues and steady profits are expected from eBay Inc (NASDAQ:EBAY) when it reports its third quarter earnings after the market close on Tuesday, November 7, 2023. The online commerce platform expects to report 3Q revenue in the range of $2.46 billion to $2.52 billion, representing forex-neutral growth between 2% and 4%.

title: EBay Stock Is Down 7% YTD, What's Next?
text: We expect the stock to edge past the consensus estimates of revenues and earnings.

title: 3 Nasdaq-100 Stocks Trading Less Than 10x 2024 Earnings
text: Since riding a five-month winning streak as high as 15,932 this summer, the tech-heavy index has reversed below 15,000. Inflation, rising interest rates and mixed Q2 earnings reports are all to blame.

title: On Amazon, eBay, and Shopify, AI is the new third-party seller
text: Purchased an Amazon Prime deal? Maybe an AI wrote the product copy that convinced you to spend.

title: eBay may be on the hook for $2BN in DOJ fines for ‘rolling coal' devices - report
text: Online retailer eBay Inc (NASDAQ:EBAY) could be fined as much as $2 billion by the US Department of Justice (DOJ) for allegedly violating environmental laws with products sold on its platform, according to a report by CNBC. The DOJ said in a September 27, 2023, statement that it was suing the online platform for violating the Clean Air Act and other environmental laws by allowing the sale of several harmful products.

title: eBay: An AI-Fueled Comeback With High Potential Returns
text: eBay is focusing on innovation and technology to enhance user experiences and drive growth in Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV). The company is working on three growth pillars: relevant experiences, scalable solutions, and magical innovations. eBay is committed to returning cash to shareholders and has an aggressive buyback strategy, with a strong balance sheet and impressive free cash flow.

title: DOJ sues eBay for selling ‘rolling coal' devices; fines could hit $2 billion
text: Rolling coal is the practice of tampering with a vehicle's emissions control system, causing it to spew black clouds of sooty exhaust.

title: eBay's first chief AI officer is building AI tools to change how people shop online, saying the AI 'paradigm shift' will happen in three phases
text: E-commerce companies eBay and Shopify are both building tools that enable online sellers to use AI. eBay chief AI officer Nitzan Mekel-Bobrov said he sees AI bringing a "paradigm shift" to e-commerce.

title: Got $5,000? These Are Some of the Cheapest AI Stocks to Buy Right Now
text: Alibaba Group Holdings, Cisco, and eBay are all making AI a key part of their future growth. These companies already have solid businesses today, and AI could make them even better.
